Course Title: Fact vs Fiction: AI in Publishing
Category: Media & Entertainment: Publishing, Film, Advertising & Communications, Gaming
Who is this for: Writers, Editors, Content Creators, Journalists, Copywriters, Editorial Assistants, Publishing Professionals, Social Media Managers, Marketing Content Specialists
Team or Dept this is for: Editorial, Marketing, Communications, Content Marketing, Publishing, Creative Services, PR
Description: Misinformation risks in articles, scripts, and editorial content.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with everyday digital tools and a general interest in how published content is created are all you need to get started with this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify common sources of AI-generated misinformation in publishing contexts such as articles, scripts, and editorial content, and explain how these inaccuracies can spread across media channels. You will also apply practical fact-checking strategies to recognise and reduce misinformation risks when working with AI tools in your creative and editorial workflows.
